parsedContent.title: PRIMARY FOUR ENGLISH EXAM
parsedContent.description: Based on the Primary 4 English Pupil’s Book

sections.name: A
sections.title: COMPREHENSION (20 Marks)
sections.description: Read the passage carefully and answer the questions.
sections.passage: My name is Keza. I study at Sunrise Primary School. Every morning, I walk to school with my brother. It takes us twenty minutes to reach school. My favourite subject is English because I enjoy reading stories. At school, there is a big library and many classrooms. After lessons, I play football with my friends before going home.

questions.text: What is the name of the school?
Who does Keza walk to school with?
How long does it take Keza to reach school?
Why does Keza like the subject?
Mention two things found at Keza’s school.
What does Keza do after lessons?
Do you enjoy playing with friends after school? Why?

subsections.name: A
subsections.title: Match the words with their meanings. (5 marks)
subsections.instructions: Match the words with their meanings.

questions.text: Match the words with their meanings
rightItems: A person who treats sick people
A place where people buy and sell things

subsections.name: B
subsections.title: Fill in the blanks using the correct words from the box. (10 marks)
subsections.instructions: Fill in the blanks using the correct words from the box.

questions.text: It is ____________ today. I can see the sun.
We carry umbrellas when it is ____________.

subsections.name: A
subsections.title: Write the negative form of the following sentences. (5 marks)
subsections.instructions: Write the negative form of the following sentences.

questions.correctAnswer: They do not play football every day.
He does not walk to school.

subsections.name: B
subsections.title: Write questions using the words given. (5 marks)
subsections.instructions: Write questions using the words given.

subsections.name: C
subsections.title: Fill in the blanks with the correct form of the verbs in brackets. (10 marks)
subsections.instructions: Fill in the blanks with the correct form of the verbs in brackets.

questions.text: There ____ many books in the library.
I am going to ____ my grandmother.

questions.correctAnswer: Not specified in the marking guide

questions.text: What do people wear when it is cold?
questions.correctAnswer: Not specified in the marking guide

questions.text: What was the weather like yesterday? Write one sentence.
questions.correctAnswer: Not specified in the marking guide
Not specified in the marking guide

subsections.title: Write five sentences about your school. (10 marks)
subsections.instructions: Use: There is / There are, next to, behind

questions.text: Write five sentences about your school.
